title: Song: Active, Smart, and Working Together
title_en: Song: Active, Smart, and Working Together
objectives: Reinforce fitness and technology vocabulary through song
Practise 'good at' and 'who/which' in a musical context

key_concepts.concept: Song Lyrics — Active, Smart, and Working Together
key_concepts.explanation:
Verse 1: We start our day active and strong, / Moving our bodies all day long. / A healthy mind needs a healthy start, / Exercise helps us become smart. / We are good at helping friends each day, / We cheer for those who lead the way!

Chorus: We are active, we are smart, / We use technology with a careful heart. / We think before we click each day, / Teamwork helps us find the way!

Verse 2: Technology helps us learn and grow, / But we use it wisely, this we know. / Not too much and not too long, / Balance keeps our minds so strong. / We choose tools which make us learn, / Not the ones that waste our turn.

Verse 3: Together we share, together we try, / Helping each other reach the sky. / We work with friends who support our team, / Together we build a future dream.

teaching_notes: This song uses both grammar points: 'good at helping', 'those who lead', 'tools which make us learn', 'friends who support'. It also addresses responsible technology use ('think before we click', 'not too much and not too long', 'balance'). Values: teamwork, balance, wise technology use.
